step_rationale: P-selectin anchors platelet adhesion and leukocyte recruitment; marker of platelet activation.
mechanism: P-selectin (CD62P) mediates platelet–leukocyte adhesion and tethering, amplifying thromboinflammation in Type 1 MI.

references.title: Platelet mass cytometry reveals dysregulation of prothrombotic pathways in essential thrombocythemia.
Platelet reactivity and mean platelet volume as risk markers of thrombogenesis in atrial fibrillation.
